016 CONTENTS: Rust on Instructional Computers Rust on Instructional Computers ------------------------------- I've installed Mozilla's Rust (https://www.rust-lang.org/) language under /share/instsww for all of the instructional lLinux sys

re/instsww for all of the instructional lLinux systems. For lists of computers, please see https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs. To use the software just make sure to add the following binary path to your path. Example (for b

owing binary path to your path. Example (for bash shell): % PATH=$PATH:/share/instsww/bin % which rustc /share/instsww/bin/rustc Instructional Support Group 384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
